## SK Hynix Completes $26.5B ADS Offering; Post-Issuance Pullback Framed as Potential Entry Point

A $26.5B raise cements SK Hynix's capacity to fund next-generation HBM buildout, but PM should assess whether dilution has been fully priced into the post-issuance pullback and whether the capital deployment timeline aligns with the HBM demand cycle — particularly in light of the simultaneously wide analyst price-target divergence flagged in the companion story.

- SK Hynix completed a $26.5B ADS capital raise, per the headline — a large-scale equity financing event
- Shares pulled back following offering completion, consistent with typical post-dilution pressure
- Coverage frames the pullback as a possible buying opportunity, though no formal recommendation is made in the headline
- Capital raise of this magnitude is likely directed at HBM and advanced memory capacity expansion
